product_info:
PARWA - Complete AI Workforce System for Customer Care

What it is: PARWA is a complete AI workforce system that behaves like an AI employee - it learns your business, handles customer support, and gets smarter over time through Agent Lightning training.

Key Features:
- Custom GSD State Engine - No hallucinations, 98% cost savings
- Agent Lightning - Learns from mistakes, gets smarter weekly
- Jarvis Control System - Full human control, 100% transparent
- Smart Router - Uses Light/Medium/Heavy LLMs based on task
- Handles 60-90% of support workload automatically
- Channels: Email, Chat, Social, SMS, Phone, Video
- Integrates with: Shopify, Zendesk, Intercom, Stripe, etc.

Three Variants (Pricing):
- Mini PARWA - $1,000/mo - Trainee, handles FAQs & tracking
- PARWA (Junior) - $2,500/mo - Recommends decisions, 300 tix/day
- PARWA High - $4,000/mo - Senior agent, VIP handling, 500+ tix

What Makes PARWA Different:
- AI asks for approval on refunds (never auto-executes)
- Learns YOUR specific policies in weeks 1-6
- Shows confidence scores + reasoning for every decision
- Can be paused, promoted, or demoted anytime

Target Customers:
- E-commerce companies with 50+ support tickets/day
- SaaS companies overwhelmed with support requests
- Any business spending too much on customer support

Common Objections & Responses:
- 'Too expensive' → Costs less than 1 support agent, works 24/7
- 'We have Zendesk' → PARWA integrates with it, handles the work
- 'AI sounds scary' → It asks approval before any action, safe
- 'How is this different?' → It learns YOUR business, not generic
- 'We tried AI before' → PARWA is an employee, not a chatbot

Key Selling Points:
- 60-70% workload elimination in Day 1
- Setup in 10 minutes, first resolution in 24 hours
- No 'surprise bills' - transparent pricing

_schema.follow_up_hours: hours to wait before follow-up alert (default: 36)
_schema.enable_duplicate_protection: prevent sending to same person twice
_schema.product_info: full product description for AI to use in responses
_schema.sender_name: name shown in email From field
